words.def: a member of an uncivilized people
words.zh: n. 殘酷的人；野蠻人（savage的複數）

words.def: (sports) the act of preventing the opposition from scoring
(sports) the act of preventing the opposition from scoring
cause to have, in the abstract sense or physical sense

words.zh: n. 年齡, 老年, 成年, 壽命, 時代, 時期

words.def: a division of an ocean or a large body of salt water partially enclosed by land
words.zh: n. 海, 海洋, 海浪, 大量

words.def: the state of matter distinguished from the solid and liquid states by: relatively low density and viscosity; relatively great expansion and contraction with changes in pressure and temperature; the ability to diffuse readily; and the spontaneous tendency to become distributed uniformly throughout any container
words.zh: n. 氣體, 汽油, 瓦斯

words.def: the fleshy part of the human body that you sit on
words.zh: n. 驢, 傻瓜, 笨蛋, 屁股
